rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF NORMAN LLOYD PETERSEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Allowance Of Fees To Conservator Of Person And Attorney, And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced To Attorney
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for the court to determine whether to grant the fee request of the conservator of the person, including 24.3 hours to prepare her fee report, which is many more hours than this court generally sees. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 11th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF SOFIA Y. NUNEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: FUTURE ACCOUNTING
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
